zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn ap Merfyn於0878年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安代洛時，他的父親Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys20歲，母親Rhain verch Rheiny16歲。他於大約0916年與Malit Ferch Llwarch在英國威爾斯布洛可爾利安迪洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於0948年10月2日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安代洛享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn ap Merfyn于0878年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安代洛时，他的父亲Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys20岁，母亲Rhain verch Rheiny16岁。他于大约0916年与Malit Ferch Llwarch在英国威尔斯布洛可爾利安迪洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于0948年10月2日在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安代洛享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merfyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Marvin
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn ap Merfyn was born in 0878, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys, was 20 and his mother, Rhain verch Rheiny, was 16. He married Malit Ferch Llwarch about 0916, in Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 0948, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn ap Merfyn est né en 0878, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Rhain verch Rheiny, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Malit Ferch Llwarch environ 0916, à Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 0948, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn ap Merfyn 0878 in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys 20 und seine Mutter Rhain verch Rheiny 16. Er hat um 0916 in Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom Malit Ferch Llwarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 0948 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Merfyn è nato il nel 0878 nel Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Rhain verch Rheiny, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Malit Ferch Llwarch circa 0916, nel Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 ottobre 0948, nel Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Merfynが0878年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで生まれた時，父Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powysは20歳，母Rhain verch Rheinyは16歳であった。約0916年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアランデロでMalit Ferch Llwarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は0948年10月2日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Merfyn(이)가 0878년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhain verch Rheiny(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 0916년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 랜디로에서 Malit Ferch Llwarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0948년 10월 2일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Merfyn nasceu em 0878, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Rhain verch Rheiny, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Malit Ferch Llwarch aproximadamente 0916, em Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 0948, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn ap Merfyn родился в 0878 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Rhain verch Rheiny, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Malit Ferch Llwarch около 0916 г. в местности лландилоу, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 0948 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn ap Merfyn nació en 0878, en Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Merfyn Manaw ap Rhodri King of Powys, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Rhain verch Rheiny, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Malit Ferch Llwarch aproximadamente 0916, en Llandilo, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de octubre de 0948, en Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
